request_payload.exposure_text: Retired General James Carter: 'NATO's burden-sharing imbalance isn't just unfair - it's a national security risk. As someone who served 35 years in uniform, I've seen firsthand how our allies' underinvestment weakens our collective defense. The data shows that only 9 of 30 allies meet the 2% GDP defense spending target. This isn't about money - it's about the lives of our service members. We need to hold our allies accountable. #StrongerAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst'
